---
name: Bug Report / Optimization
about: Report a bug in a solution or propose a performance optimization.
title: 'bug(solution): [Problem Name] - [Brief Description]'
labels: bug, needs-review
assignees: Balaji0602
---

**Describe the Bug / Issue**
A clear and concise description of the bug, syntax error, memory leak, or performance issues in the existing Java solution.

**Affected Solution**
- File Path: e.g., `src/main/java/com/balaji/leetcode/arrays/TwoSum.java`
- Problem Link: e.g., https://leetcode.com/problems/two-sum/

**Expected Behavior**
Explain what the expected output/behavior is, including time/space complexity optimization constraints.

**Input & Output Examples**
```
Input: nums = [3,2,4], target = 6
Expected: [1,2]
Actual (if bug): [0,0] (or time limit exceeded)
```

**Proposed Fix (Optional)**
If you have a solution or refactoring strategy, please outline it here.
